description: Seeded permuted-block randomization schedule; every arm appears in the specified ratio within each block, so balance is maintained throughout enrollment.
rules: read-only — reads a JSON spec, writes a CSV; mutates no live service
seeded — the exact schedule is reproducible from SPEC_JSON.seed
block_size must be a multiple of sum(ratio)
needs numpy + pandas; no network or GPU
usage: Set SPEC_JSON to a JSON file with keys: n (required int), arms (list[str]), block_size (int), ratio (list[int]), seed (int). Output: allocation_schedule.csv under record_store.
limitation: Fixed small blocks are slightly predictable in unblinded trials — vary block size if that matters. No power/sample-size calculation.
